request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Decompose a prediction-market contract's resolution criteria into 1-3 atomic conditions. Each condition should describe one independent path by which the contract can resolve YES. Return JSON matching the provided schema; labels ≤ 40 chars; summaries ≤ 200 chars.
request.user:
Title: Will the SEC approve a spot Bitcoin ETF by January 15, 2024?
Resolution criteria: Resolves YES if any spot Bitcoin ETF receives approval from the U.S. Securities
and Exchange Commission by January 15, 2024, 11:59 PM ET. Approval means an
effective SEC order permitting listing on NYSE Arca, Cboe BZX, or NASDAQ.
Resolves NO otherwise.

Settlement entities: ['U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission', 'Division of Trading and Markets', 'Division of Investment Management', 'BlackRock', 'Fidelity Investments', 'VanEck', 'Grayscale Investments', 'Ark Investment Management', 'Invesco', 'WisdomTree']

conditions.label: SEC OKs NYSE Arca spot BTC ETF
conditions.summary: An effective SEC order by Jan 15, 2024, 11:59 PM ET permits listing of any spot Bitcoin ETF on NYSE Arca.

conditions.label: SEC OKs Cboe BZX spot BTC ETF
conditions.summary: An effective SEC order by Jan 15, 2024, 11:59 PM ET permits listing of any spot Bitcoin ETF on Cboe BZX.

conditions.label: SEC OKs Nasdaq spot BTC ETF
conditions.summary: An effective SEC order by Jan 15, 2024, 11:59 PM ET permits listing of any spot Bitcoin ETF on NASDAQ.
